summary: Tested Price Integrity P2 features: ticker normalization, price_data in candidates, entry_status classification, price_audit debug logging, ticker_mappings endpoint. All 12 backend tests pass. Frontend access gate, Auto Trade, Live Prices, and Investments pages all working correctly.

backend_tests.ticker_mappings_known_renames: PASS - 14 known renames (ZI→GTM, TWTR→X, FB→META, etc.)
backend_tests.price_integrity_zi_renamed: PASS - ZI correctly shows is_renamed=true, ticker_canonical=GTM, price=$5.96
backend_tests.price_integrity_mrvl_healthy: PASS - MRVL healthy with price ~$87, stale=false, source=alpaca
backend_tests.auto_trade_scan_excludes_dead: PASS - No dead tickers (ZI, TWTR, SIVB) in scan results
backend_tests.auto_trade_scan_has_price_audit: PASS - price_audit array present with required fields
backend_tests.candidates_have_price_data: PASS - All candidates have price_data object with price, source, synced_at, status
backend_tests.investments_excludes_dead: PASS - SIVB, TWTR excluded (ZI allowed as it maps to live GTM)
backend_tests.renamed_tickers_allowed: PASS - ZI (→GTM) allowed in investments since GTM is live
backend_tests.sync_signals_returns_counts: PASS - Returns updated, dead_flagged, rejected, total

frontend_tests.access_gate: PASS - Login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 works
frontend_tests.dashboard: PASS - Shows Hot Trading Signals and Top Investment Ideas
frontend_tests.auto_trade_page: PASS - Shows scheduler RUNNING, market CLOSED, DT:65/LT:72 thresholds
frontend_tests.live_prices_tab: PASS - Tab clickable, shows Start Live Feed button (OFFLINE - market closed)
frontend_tests.investments_page: PASS - Shows 1250 stocks analyzed, Hot(166), Bullish(279), Undervalued(51)

api_verification./api/auth/access: PASS - Returns token with valid code
api_verification./api/auto-trade/scan: PASS - Contains price_audit array, candidates have price_data + entry_status
api_verification./api/prices/sync-signals: PASS - Returns updated + dead_flagged + rejected + total

critical_code_review_comments: Price Integrity Service correctly implements ticker normalization (14 KNOWN_RENAMES)
ZI→GTM mapping works correctly - ZI is NOT dead, it maps to live GTM ($5.96)
TWTR→X mapping works but TWTR is flagged dead (last trade 2025-06-17)
scan_opportunities adds price_data and entry_status to all candidates
price_audit array (50 entries) provides per-symbol debug logging
entry_status classification: TRADE_NOW, WATCHLIST, MISSED, NO_LEVELS, UNKNOWN
context_for_next_testing_agent: Price Integrity P2 features verified. Key findings: (1) ZI is NOT dead - it's renamed to GTM which is actively trading at $5.96. (2) TWTR and SIVB are correctly flagged as dead. (3) 14 known renames in KNOWN_RENAMES dict. (4) 165 dead tickers flagged in MongoDB. (5) All candidates in scan have price_data object and entry_status field. (6) price_audit array provides debug logging for top 50 candidates.
features_verified: GET /api/debug/ticker_mappings returns 14 known renames and 165+ dead tickers
GET /api/auto-trade/scan excludes dead tickers, has price_audit array
Each candidate has price_data object with price, source, synced_at, status
Each candidate has entry_status: TRADE_NOW, WATCHLIST, MISSED, NO_LEVELS, UNKNOWN
Frontend access gate, Auto Trade, Live Prices, Investments all working
